## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance and content strategy for treasury management-related topics.](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Spike in impressions for blog pages, but not in clicks; expense category pages saw slight decrease in impressions but jump in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team to hold off on "best bank account" or "best banks" content, focusing instead on treasury cash management and operating accounts](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Concerns raised about keyword search volumes and potential content cannibalization; team to provide more context on target keywords and de-duping efforts](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Recent content refresh for tuning pages went live last Friday; too early for performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Blog pages: All-time high impressions last week, leveling off now; marginal increase in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Expense category pages: Slight decrease in impressions, jump in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Team investigating which pages gained more clicks, but improvement seems broad across many pages](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Matt noted some share of voice metrics falling off for expense categories](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Vivek observed similar impression drops across other clients, possibly seasonal](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

### Treasury Management Content Strategy

  - [Team sent templates for category pages for review](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Ali's feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - [Hold off on "best bank account" or "best banks" content due to regulatory concerns](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Focus on treasury cash management, operating accounts, and specific competitors (e.g., "mercury account alternative")](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [Skip "best credit unions per state" for now](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Proceed with metric tracking topics (e.g., how to calculate days cash on hand, earn rate)](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Vivek explained the rationale behind bank-focused content, citing search volume and product relevance](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Agreement to create one sample write-up (e.g., "best banks for small business in California") for treasury team review](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Keyword and Content Concerns

  - [Ali highlighted issues with search volume data, noting many keywords show as zero volume](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [Vivek clarified the focus is on broad topic coverage rather than specific high-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Team discussed the need for:](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
    1.  Target keywords to understand topic intent and SERP landscape
    2.  Confirmation of no existing competing articles
    3.  Differentiation between similar topics (e.g., cash flow projection template vs. how to calculate cash flow)

### Recent Content Updates

  - [Tuning pages published last Friday (2025-02-07)](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Refreshed content that wasn't getting much traffic](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Too early to see performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create one sample write-up for "best banks for small business in California" for treasury team review](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Provide target keywords for proposed topics to better understand intent and SERP landscape](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Conduct de-duping efforts to avoid cannibalizing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of recently published tuning pages](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Revisit keyword strategy to balance between broad topic coverage and specific, high-intent queries](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Ali to discuss bank-related content concerns further with the Treasury team](https://fathom.video/share/3zzrCFKqs_9vCX2EaqL8g7xL2S854nUN?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
